problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
